jobs.title: Frontend Web Developer Intern
jobs.description: Support product teams by building responsive UI sections, reusable components, and performance-focused frontend features.
responsibilities: Build and maintain UI components using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Collaborate with designers to turn mockups into production-ready pages
Fix responsive layout issues across mobile and desktop
requirements: Strong understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and modern JavaScript
Comfortable with Git and GitHub workflows
Portfolio projects that show real frontend work

jobs.title: AI/ML Engineer
jobs.description: Design and ship practical ML features for automation, prediction, and content intelligence in client projects.
responsibilities: Prototype and productionize ML models for NLP and vision tasks
Work with engineering to deploy models into web applications
Track model performance and improve accuracy over time
requirements: Experience with Python and at least one ML framework
Strong fundamentals in data preprocessing and evaluation
Ability to explain technical choices to non-technical teams

jobs.title: Lead Generation Specialist
jobs.description: Own prospect research and outreach execution for B2B service clients across global markets.
responsibilities: Research targeted accounts and decision makers
Prepare outreach lists with verified contact information
Support campaign performance reporting
requirements: Excellent written English communication
Experience with outreach and CRM tools
Strong attention to detail in data collection

jobs.title: Operations Associate
jobs.description: Coordinate internal processes, project handoffs, and documentation across cross-functional teams.
responsibilities: Maintain task workflows and delivery tracking
Support internal documentation and reporting
Coordinate communication between project teams
requirements: Strong organizational and communication skills
Experience using project tracking tools
Ability to manage multiple deadlines

jobs.title: UI/UX Design Intern
jobs.description: Help craft clean, conversion-focused interfaces for business websites, dashboards, and product landing pages.
responsibilities: Create wireframes and interface mockups in Figma
Assist with design system updates and component libraries
Work with developers to ensure implementation quality
requirements: Portfolio with at least 2 UI case studies
Good understanding of typography and spacing
Ability to take and apply feedback quickly

jobs.title: n8n Workflow Automation Consultant
jobs.description: Build and optimize n8n automations for ecommerce, operations, and customer support workflows.
responsibilities: Design robust automations with reusable workflow patterns
Integrate APIs and databases into workflow pipelines
Document deployment and maintenance procedures
requirements: Hands-on experience with n8n in production environments
Ability to debug integration and webhook issues
Experience with API authentication and data mapping

jobs.title: Project Hunter (Intern – Commission Based)
jobs.description:
We’re looking for a Project Hunter to bring in clients and manage communication between clients and our team.

💰 Compensation: 20% per successfully delivered project (No fixed salary)
If you can bring clients, we want you.

regards Muhammad Shahzeb Malik from VSG team dev
responsibilities: • Finding and secure projects (LinkedIn, Upwork, etc.)
• Communicate with clients & follow up
• Keep coordination smooth with our team
requirements: • Proven client hunting / lead generation
• Strong communication skills
• Bonus: existing network
